message:
fix(genome): address semantic overlay issues — addAgent, removeAgent, manifest staleness

- addAgent: when adding an agent with same name as a root agent, bumps
  version above root's to ensure exportLearnings classifies it correctly
- removeAgent: better error message for root-only agents, documents that
  removing an overlay re-exposes the root version
- syncRoot: always saves manifest when content changes, not just when
  new agents or conflicts are detected — prevents manifest staleness
  that could mask future conflicts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
